projectDescription: An open-source, cross-platform interactive terminal client for browsing and downloading content from 3DS storefronts.
keyFeatures: Browse nested 3DS storefronts hosted on Google Drive
Download homebrew and other 3DS content directly from the terminal
Custom download path configuration via download_path.txt
Input automation and batch downloading with input buffer
Can be compiled to a standalone executable with PyInstaller
Zero external dependencies — uses Python standard library only
publicApiSurface: main.py — entry point, run directly with Python
storefront.json — storefront data format (key: [url/id, type/filename, path])
home.3sf — override default home storefront Google Drive ID
input — input automation file (pre-recorded key sequences)
Navigation command: numeric index to select items
Navigation command: x to return to home storefront
Navigation command: 15+ char string to open storefront by Google Drive ID directly
Navigation command: dump to write current input log to file
Navigation command: all to batch-download all non-storefront items
